CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Co, Esq., 415.426.3553, for plaintiff Eduardo Orantes.
Laura Hayward, Esq., 415.677.3180, for defendants Academy of Art University and Stephens Institute dba Academy of Art University.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK DEFENDANTS ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY AND STEPHENS INSTITUTE DOING BUSINESS AS ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration UNDER SUBMISSION. Counsel for both parties have submitted proposed orders at the conclusion of the hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Continued To Apr-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY and STEPHENS INSTITUTE's Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued to April 3, 2014, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its opposition papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
